variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 17449 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 17449 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 17449 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Mann Filter C 27 380 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17449
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.

variants.title: Donaldson P953554 Air Filter, Primary Obround Powercore | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17449
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P953554 Air Filter, Primary Obround Powercore is designed to provide reliable performance in air filter, primary obround powercore applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4409 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17449
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4409 axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
